Package com.krishcpatel.realm.economy

package com.krishcpatel.realm.economy
  • Class
    Description
    BalanceCommand
    Command executor for /bal and /balance.
    EconomyAdminCommand
    Admin economy command executor for /eco.
    EconomyManager
    Economy business logic layer.
    EconomyModule
    Economy module bootstrapper.
    EconomyRepository
    Database access layer for economy operations.
    LedgerCommand
    Admin command to view recent ledger entries for a player.
    LedgerEntry
    A single immutable row from the economy ledger.
    LedgerRecordedEvent
    Event published after a ledger entry has been committed to the database.
    LedgerRepository
    Repository for creating and reading economy ledger entries.
    MoneySource
    Identifies the subsystem that initiated a money movement.
    PayCommand
    Command executor for /pay <player> <amount>.
    TransactionManager
    Central gateway for all money movement in the server economy.
    TransactionResult
    Result of a transaction performed by TransactionManager.
